Pharmacology: Drugs, medicines, prescriptions, dosage, pharmacokinetics, pharmacodynamics, adverse effects, antibiotics, antihypertensives, analgesics.
Pathology: Disease mechanisms, inflammation, necrosis, tumors, carcinoma, histopathology, biopsy, cell injury.
Microbiology: Bacteria, viruses, fungi, microorganisms, cultures, gram staining, infection, microbiological diagnosis.
Forensic Medicine: Poisoning, autopsy, postmortem examination, injury, hanging, asphyxia, medico-legal cases.
Community Medicine: Epidemiology, public health, vaccination, prevalence, incidence, screening, surveys, healthcare programs.
